itinerary.title: Luxury Dubai Tour
itinerary.overview:
06 Nights / 07 Days Ultimate Luxury Dubai Discovery SERIAL CODE: UAE-004 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-DXB-LUX-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Dubai / UAE CATEGORY: Best Dubai Luxury Tour Package DURATION: 06 Nights / 07 Days DESTINATIONS: Dubai

TOUR OVERVIEW
Indulge in the zenith of opulence with our TRAGUIN curated luxury Dubai escape. Designed for the discerning traveler, this luxury Dubai holiday blends futuristic metropolitan glamour with serene coastal sanctuaries. Experience exclusive experiences, stay at handpicked hotels, and build unforgettable memories.

WHY CHOOSE OUR LUXURY DUBAI EXPERIENCE?
Dubai is a global beacon of luxury and innovation, offering a lifestyle of sheer sophistication. Our curated experiences ensure your journey is unmatched. With TRAGUIN, enjoy exclusive experiences, private yacht charters, and premium stays that define a premium Dubai experience. Discover the iconic attractions that make Dubai a dream destination. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 06 Nights / 07 Days Dubai package (UAE-004 / TRG-DXB-LUX-2026): Dubai with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

days.title: ARRIVAL IN DUBAI
days.description: Your TRAGUIN luxury escape begins with a VIP chauffeur service. Experience true opulence from the moment you land, followed by a private transfer to your handpicked hotel.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: METROPOLITAN LUXURY
days.description: Visit the iconic Burj Khalifa and experience top-tier luxury shopping at the Dubai Mall. A curated experience to admire the city's breathtaking landscapes.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DESERT OAK OASIS
days.description: A private desert oasis experience. Indulge in exclusive experiences like a private falconry display and a gourmet dinner under the stars amidst breathtaking landscapes.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: PRIVATE YACHT CRUISE
days.description: Savor the scenic beauty of the Dubai skyline with a private luxury yacht cruise. An immersive experience that defines our premium stays in Dubai.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: PALM JUMEIRAH RETREAT
days.description: Relax at an iconic attraction—the Palm Jumeirah. Enjoy a spa day and world-class dining, creating unforgettable memories in ultimate luxury.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: CULTURE & HERITAGE
days.description: Discover old Dubai and the gold souks. This immersive experience contrasts with the modern city, showcasing the rich history of a premium Dubai experience.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN chauffeur transfer, concluding your luxury Dubai holiday.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

Private luxury airport transfers and dedicated chauffeur-driven executive van
